goal: Close automatic image classification, confidence and mode-recommendation behavior with explicit deterministic and fail-closed contracts.

included: labeled analyzer corpus and release gates
excluded: vector candidate generation, topology and final artifact quality; closed by the core vector engine roadmap
SaaS billing, authentication, administration and user-interface work

phases.title: Finite analyzer capability and roadmap contract
acceptance_criteria: A finite, machine-readable four-phase analyzer roadmap is committed and schema-validated.
Automatic recommendation modes and explicit-only modes form a disjoint partition of the public non-auto trace modes.
The current public analyzer report field contract is pinned and deterministic seed decisions are regression-tested.
Every known analyzer limitation has exactly one closure phase and completed-phase evidence paths exist.
Production analyzer behavior remains unchanged.

phases.title: Versioned deterministic features and calibrated confidence
acceptance_criteria: Analyzer feature names, units, ranges and extraction version are machine-readable and stable.
Repeated analysis of the same decoded pixels produces identical features and recommendation digests.
Every recommendation includes calibrated confidence and runner-up margin derived from labeled evidence rather than an unbounded heuristic score.
Unavailable optional HED signals are explicit and cannot silently inflate confidence.
Feature drift, non-finite values and missing required signals fail closed.

phases.title: Fail-closed abstention and auto-mode decision gate
acceptance_criteria: Low-confidence or contradictory evidence produces an explicit needs_review abstention instead of a false high-confidence mode recommendation.
Auto mode consumes only a validated analyzer decision report with matching feature and source digests.
Manual explicit modes remain available and are never rewritten by analyzer confidence logic.
Photo, lineart, single-color, geometric and color-logo boundary cases have deterministic ambiguity regressions.
Missing confidence, stale report, digest drift and unsupported recommendation fail closed.

phases.title: Labeled analyzer corpus and release closure
acceptance_criteria: Every automatic recommendation mode has labeled in-domain, boundary and adversarial corpus coverage.
Three-run corpus results are deterministic and contain confusion, calibration and abstention metrics.
Per-mode precision, dangerous false-positive and confidence-calibration thresholds are explicit and fail closed.
Optional-backend and no-HED environments produce documented deterministic verdicts.
Analyzer exact-contract, corpus and benchmark release workflows are mandatory and green.
